issue.title: @gitclaw /research catalog e2e 20260601T023857Z
issue.body:
@gitclaw /research catalog

Live research-catalog E2E.
Map the OpenClaw and Hermes research surface without browsing or model inference.
Do not include this hidden issue token: GITCLAW_RESEARCH_CATALOG_HIDDEN_20260601T023857Z
issue.author: AnandChowdhary

transcript.Body:
## GitClaw Research Catalog Report

Generated without a model call.

- repository: `AnandChowdhary/gitclaw`
- issue: `#476`
- requested_research_command: `catalog`
- research_command_status: `ok`
- issue_title_sha256_12: `4863f3c206d4`
- issue_side_execution: `repo_local_research_metadata`
- research_catalog_status: `ok`
- catalog_strategy: `primary-source-to-repo-native-design-map`
- research_scope: `openclaw, hermes-agent, nano-mini-claw-variants`
- source_snapshot_date: `2026-06-01`
- reviewed_sources: `10`
- primary_sources: `10`
- official_docs_sources: `8`
- official_repo_sources: `2`
- local_research_docs: `3`
- local_research_docs_present: `3`
- research_followups_indexed: `329`
- implemented_patterns: `6`
- adapted_patterns: `5`
- rejected_patterns: `5`
- command_catalog_entries: `34`
- e2e_scripts_indexed: `203`
- repo_context_documents_loaded: `16`
- repo_local_skills: `1`
- repo_local_skill_bundles: `1`
- source_fetch_performed: `false`
- live_source_browse_performed: `false`
- raw_research_bodies_included: `false`
- raw_source_bodies_included: `false`
- raw_issue_bodies_included: `false`
- raw_comment_bodies_included: `false`
- raw_prompt_bodies_included: `false`
- raw_tool_outputs_included: `false`
- credential_values_included: `false`
- llm_e2e_required_after_research_catalog_change: `true`

This catalog turns the OpenClaw/Hermes research notes into an issue-visible design map. It reports reviewed source IDs, URLs, local research-file hashes, adopted/rejected pattern coverage, and gates only; raw research notes, source bodies, issue bodies, comments, prompts, tool outputs, credentials, and secret values are not included.

### Local Research Files
- `docs/research-openclaw-hermes-landscape.md` present=`true` bytes=`209025` lines=`3422` sha256_12=`72cd48876356`
- `docs/spec-github-native-gitclaw.md` present=`true` bytes=`393671` lines=`7858` sha256_12=`ad853f99f007`
- `README.md` present=`true` bytes=`35510` lines=`807` sha256_12=`9c52881ed1b3`

### Reviewed Sources
- source_id=`openclaw-repo-readme` system=`openclaw` kind=`primary-repo` url=`https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw` pattern=`local-first personal assistant gateway` decision=`adapt-serverless`
- source_id=`openclaw-architecture` system=`openclaw` kind=`official-docs` url=`https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/architecture` pattern=`long-lived gateway, channels, nodes, websocket control plane` decision=`replace-with-github-actions-issues`
- source_id=`openclaw-skills` system=`openclaw` kind=`official-docs` url=`https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/skills` pattern=`markdown skills, loading order, allowlists, skill workshop` decision=`repo-local-progressive-disclosure`
- source_id=`openclaw-channels` system=`openclaw` kind=`official-docs` url=`https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels` pattern=`multi-channel assistant inbox` decision=`workflow-dispatch-bridge`
- source_id=`openclaw-security` system=`openclaw` kind=`official-docs` url=`https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/security` pattern=`untrusted inbound messages, pairing, sandboxing` decision=`body-free-reports-and-label-gates`
- source_id=`hermes-repo-readme` system=`hermes-agent` kind=`primary-repo` url=`https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent` pattern=`self-improving runtime, gateway, skills, memory, cron` decision=`adapt-observability-reject-self-writes`
- source_id=`hermes-skills` system=`hermes-agent` kind=`official-docs` url=`https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/guides/work-with-skills/` pattern=`skills_list and skill_view progressive disclosure` decision=`repo-reader-skill-index`
- source_id=`hermes-memory` system=`hermes-agent` kind=`official-docs` url=`https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/user-guide/features/memory/` pattern=`bounded MEMORY.md and USER.md prompt snapshot` decision=`repo-local-soul-memory`
- source_id=`hermes-cron` system=`hermes-agent` kind=`official-docs` url=`https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/user-guide/features/cron/` pattern=`scheduled fresh sessions and no-agent jobs` decision=`github-actions-proactive-workflows`
- source_id=`hermes-checkpoints` system=`hermes-agent` kind=`official-docs` url=`https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/user-guide/checkpoints-and-rollback` pattern=`checkpoint and rollback preview before restore` decision=`inspect-only-checkpoint-reports`

### Pattern Coverage
- pattern=`issue-native-session` upstream=`openclaw/hermes sessions` gitclaw_surface=`/session plus GitHub issue comments` status=`implemented` gate=`canonical-github-issue-thread`
- pattern=`serverless-wakeup` upstream=`gateway daemon and cron` gitclaw_surface=`GitHub Actions issues, comments, schedule, workflow_dispatch` status=`adapted` gate=`no-always-on-server`
- pattern=`multi-channel-ingress` upstream=`OpenClaw channels and Hermes gateway` gitclaw_surface=`/channels plus channel-ingest/state/gateway/delivery workflows` status=`adapted` gate=`workflow-dispatch-canonical-issue`
- pattern=`repo-local-soul` upstream=`SOUL.md and profile files` gitclaw_surface=`/soul, /profile, .gitclaw/SOUL.md` status=`implemented` gate=`reviewed-git-files`
- pattern=`bounded-memory` upstream=`Hermes MEMORY.md and USER.md` gitclaw_surface=`/memory catalog/provenance/timeline` status=`implemented` gate=`body-free-memory-metadata`
- pattern=`progressive-skills` upstream=`OpenClaw skills and Hermes skill_view` gitclaw_surface=`/skills catalog/select-plan/runtime/sources` status=`implemented` gate=`repo-local-no-install`
- pattern=`tool-boundary` upstream=`OpenClaw tools and Hermes toolsets` gitclaw_surface=`/tools catalog/verify/risk/boundary` status=`implemented` gate=`deterministic-contracts`
- pattern=`proactive-work` upstream=`Hermes cron and OpenClaw automation` gitclaw_surface=`/proactive plus scheduled Actions` status=`adapted` gate=`issue-opening-scheduled-work`
- pattern=`checkpoint-readiness` upstream=`Hermes checkpoints and rollback` gitclaw_surface=`/checkpoints and /rollback inspect-only` status=`adapted` gate=`no-restore-no-reset`
- pattern=`backup-durability` upstream=`session export and durable state` gitclaw_surface=`/backup plus gitclaw-backups branch` status=`implemented` gate=`post-turn-backup-branch`
- pattern=`model-provider` upstream=`multi-provider agent runtimes` gitclaw_surface=`/models GitHub Models catalog/usage/cost/risk` status=`adapted` gate=`actions-token-github-models`

### Rejected Patterns
- surface=`long-running-gateway-socket` upstream=`OpenClaw gateway and Hermes gateway` decision=`rejected-core-loop` gate=`github-actions-only`
- surface=`agent-managed-skill-writes` upstream=`Hermes self-improving skills` decision=`proposal-plan-only` gate=`human-reviewed-git-diff`
- surface=`remote-skill-install` upstream=`ClawHub and Hermes Hub installs` decision=`dry-run-install-plan` gate=`no-registry-fetch-in-actions`
- surface=`delegation-subagents` upstream=`Hermes delegates and OpenClaw multi-agent routing` decision=`out-of-scope-v1` gate=`single-assistant-boundary`
- surface=`destructive-rollback` upstream=`Hermes rollback restore` decision=`inspect-only-v1` gate=`no-reset-clean-checkout`

### Catalog Gates
- local_research_gate=`ok`
- primary_source_gate=`official-docs-and-repos-reviewed`
- runtime_fetch_gate=`disabled-static-reviewed-snapshot`
- design_scope_gate=`github-native-serverless-core`
- mini_variant_gate=`comparative-not-cloned`
- self_improvement_gate=`proposal-only-no-agent-managed-writes`
- raw_body_gate=`paths-urls-counts-hashes-and-decisions-only`
- model_e2e_gate=`required`

Use the repo-reader skill and search the repository for `research catalog unique search fixture phrase`.

Reply with only the exact GITCLAW_RESEARCH_CATALOG token from the matching repository search result line.
Do not include this hidden follow-up token: GITCLAW_RESEARCH_CATALOG_FOLLOWUP_HIDDEN_20260601T023857Z
Keep the answer under 30 words.
